processing.text: if @@admin <> 1 and @type = 1 begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.MaxvOnline$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'Lot', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = 0 end declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @fields nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @irregularChars varchar(128), @r int select @field = 'ma_lo', @irregularChars = '''`~!@#$%^&*(),;"<>?/\,_' select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có hoặc lồng nhau.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end select @fields = 'ma_vt, ma_lo, ngay_nhap, ten_lo, ten_lo2, ngay_sx, ngay_hhsd, ngay_hhbh' alter table @@table alter column ma_vt char(32) alter table @@table alter column ma_lo char(32) create index i on @@table (ma_vt, ma_lo) if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a join dmlo b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ma_lo = b.ma_lo select @field = 'ma_lo', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_lo like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; select @field = 'ma_vt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_vt <> '' and ma_vt not in (select ma_vt from dmvt where lo_yn = 1)&Error; select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmlo b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ma_lo = b.ma_lo delete @@table from @@table a join #k b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ma_lo = b.ma_lo select @field = 'ma_lo' select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ma_lo <> b.ma_lo and a.ma_lo like rtrim(b.ma_lo)' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, dmlo b with (index(PK_dmlo)) where a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ma_lo like rtrim(b.ma_lo) &Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from dmlo a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ma_lo like rtrim(b.ma_lo) ' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; set @q = 'insert into dmlo(' + @fields + ', status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2, sl_nhap, sl_xuat, ghi_chu, ' set @q = @q + 'ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6)' set @q = @q + 'select ' + @fields + ', ''1'', getdate(), getdate(), rtrim(@@userID), rtrim(@@userID), 0, 0, '''', ' set @q = @q + ''''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0 from @@table' exec sp_executesql @q if @type = '1' begin update dmlo set ten_lo = b.ten_lo, ten_lo2 = b.ten_lo2, ngay_nhap = b.ngay_nhap, ngay_sx = b.ngay_sx, ngay_hhsd = b.ngay_hhsd, ngay_hhbh = b.ngay_hhbh, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID from dmlo a, #k b where a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ma_lo = b.ma_lo end
